caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recorded in a studio setting with dark, ribbed sound-absorbing foam panels in the background. He wears a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. A professional silver condenser microphone, attached to a black boom arm labeled " Rode Procaster", is positioned in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man speaks and gestures with his hands. He begins by raising his left hand high and open, then lowers it slightly while continuing to talk. He shifts his gaze and facial expressions, with his mouth open as he speaks. In the final moments, he gestures with both hands, moving them closer to his chest as he maintains an expressive, talking posture. No other people or text are visible in the scene.
